text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower stops coming to training sessions,
declaring that she's quitting the team because she
doesn't want to be a burden.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This incident causes the team to realize how they
shouldn't have been suppressing their
individuality in order to keep the peace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While trying to convince Rice Shower to rejoin
the team, Matikanefukukitaru proposes it would
be lucky for them to run all the way to a distant
beach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower puts a stop to this idea, thus
cementing her importance as the team's voice of
reason. This helps her regain her confidence.
